description: Firewall device create POSTs the device id/type to the firewall's devices collection. All local validation messages diverge between languages (see report), so only the confirmed success path is captured.

cases.name: rejects a non-positive firewall_id once confirmed
cases.expect_error: firewall_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: assigns a device to a firewall
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This assigns a device to a Cloud Firewall. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects an invalid device type (proto FirewallDeviceType enum)
cases.expect_error: type must be one of: linode, nodebalancer, linode_interface
